🧪 Test Quality Audit 2 weak test(s)
Tests below contain no real assertion or only tautological/vacuous checks. They always pass — they don't actually verify anything about the app, contributing only noise to the report.
SeverityTestIssueLocation
HIGHTestQA07Accessibility::test_qa07_phone_input_has_label`assert or True` always passes — the X check is deadtest_qa_comprehensive.py:2002
HIGHTestQA08MobileAndViewport::test_qa08_hamburger_menu_visible_on_mobile`assert or True` always passes — the X check is deadtest_qa_comprehensive.py:2066
To fix: open the test file and replace the weak assertion with one that actually checks the expected outcome (e.g. assert exact text, URL, or DOM state — not X >= 0 or True).

QA-01 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa01 page title contains mehad
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa01_page_title_contains_mehad 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 2.62s
📋 What this test was checking
Page title must mention Mehad (brand presence check) — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Page title must mention Mehad (brand presence check).
✗ What actually happened
Brand name not in title: 'Radd'
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)
E   AssertionError: Brand name not in title: 'Radd'
E   assert ('mehad' in 'radd' or 'مهد' in 'Radd')
E    +  where 'radd' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x7f9392ea3ab0>()
E    +    where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x7f9392ea3ab0> = 'Radd'.lower

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:151: in test_qa01_page_title_contains_mehad
    assert "mehad" in title.lower() or "مهد" in title, (
E   AssertionError: Brand name not in title: 'Radd'
E   assert ('mehad' in 'radd' or 'مهد' in 'Radd')
E    +  where 'radd' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x7f9392ea3ab0>()
E    +    where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x7f9392ea3ab0> = 'Radd'.lower

📋 What this test was checking

🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Click the navigation link being tested
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Clicking Find a Teacher with no filters navigates to /en/find-tutors.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 8000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 8000ms exceeded.

E     - waiting for locator("button:has-text(\"Find a Teacher\"), a:has-text(\"Find a Teacher\")").first to be visible

    self._sync(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:741: in wait_for
    await self._frame.wait_for_selector(

    await self._channel.send(

    return await self._connection.wrap_api_call(

Failed: Test qa01 login modal opens on button click
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa01_login_modal_opens_on_button_click 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 24.11s
📋 What this test was checking
Clicking Log In button must open the login modal/dialog — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Clicking Log In button must open the login modal/dialog.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)

🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa01_send_code_button_present 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 24.08s
📋 What this test was checking
Send Code button must be present in the login modal — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)

📋 What this test was checking
After clicking Send Code, OTP input must appear/become enabled — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Enter the OTP code that arrives via WhatsApp
  5. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
After clicking Send Code, OTP input must appear/become enabled.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)

🧪 Test data used
fill("123")
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)

✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

📋 What this test was checking
EC-M-17: Find a Teacher with no filters must navigate to find-tutors — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Use the search field on the page
  3. Click the navigation link being tested
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
EC-M-17: Find a Teacher with no filters must navigate to find-tutors.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 8000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 8000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("button:has-text(\"Find a Teacher\"), a:has-text(\"Find a Teacher\")").first to be visible

QA-02 -013 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec phone boundary lengths
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 24.03s
📋 What this test was checking
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en. Test parameters: 7, min, 7, digits.
🧪 Test data used
params: [7, min, 7, digits]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Use these parameters: 7, min, 7, digits
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm

BASE_URL

  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en

QA-06 -003 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa06 json responses are well formed
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa06_json_responses_are_well_formed 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 0.00s
📋 What this test was checking
Every application/json response on homepage load must parse and be a dict or list (not a stray string or null). Catches malformed JSON, accidental HTML error pages served with json content-type, and truncated responses — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Every application/json response on homepage load must parse and
✗ What actually happened
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jsonschema'
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)

🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa07_html_lang_attribute_set 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 2.04s
📋 What this test was checking
HTML element must have a lang attribute set to a valid language code — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
HTML element must have a lang attribute set to a valid language code.
✗ What actually happened
HTML lang attribute missing or too short: None
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm

🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa07_modal_has_dialog_role 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 23.52s
📋 What this test was checking
Login modal must use role='dialog' for screen reader accessibility — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Login modal must use role='dialog' for screen reader accessibility.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

Failed: Test qa09 html lang attribute present
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa09_html_lang_attribute_present 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 2.57s
📋 What this test was checking
<html> must have a valid `lang` attribute (en for /en, ar for /ar) — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)

<html> must have a valid `lang` attribute (en for /en, ar for /ar).
✗ What actually happened

Failed: Test qa10 arabic modal opens
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa10_arabic_modal_opens 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 18.57s
📋 What this test was checking
Login modal must open on /ar (RTL doesn't break the modal) — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Switch the page language to Arabic (or load /ar)
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Login modal must open on /ar (RTL doesn't break the modal).
✗ What actually happened
The test tried to click a button, but the button never became clickable within 15000ms. Often this means the button is hidden or covered by another element.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
E       29 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable
E          - element is not enabled
E        - retrying click action
E          - waiting 500ms

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2381: in test_qa10_arabic_modal_opens
    btn.click()
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:17422: in click
    self._sync(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:163: in click
    return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:569: in _click
    await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals()))
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send
    return await self._connection.wrap_api_call(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None

E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("[aria-label=\"Login\"], [aria-label=\"تسجيل الدخول\"], button:has-text(\"Log In\"), button:has-text(\"Login\"), button:has-text(\"تسجيل الدخول\")").filter(visible=True).first
E       - locator resolved to <button disabled type="submit" data-slot="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px] aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive text-…>تسجيل الدخول</button>

params: [homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en]

  2. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en

QA-13 -001 CRITICAL P0
Failed: Test qa13 strict transport security present
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 0.69s
📋 What this test was checking
HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS) — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
✗ What actually happened
Missing Strict-Transport-Security header — HTTPS downgrade attacks possible. Recommend: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2669: in test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present
    assert hsts, (
E   AssertionError: Missing Strict-Transport-Security header — HTTPS downgrade attacks possible. Recommend: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
E   assert ''

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2669: in test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present
    assert hsts, (
E   AssertionError: Missing Strict-Transport-Security header — HTTPS downgrade attacks possible. Recommend: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
E   assert ''

BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Must protect against clickjacking via X-Frame-Options OR
✗ What actually happened

🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa13_referrer_policy_present 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 0.22s
📋 What this test was checking
Referrer-Policy controls what referrer info is leaked to other sites — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Referrer-Policy controls what referrer info is leaked to other sites.
✗ What actually happened
Missing Referrer-Policy header — full URL referrers may leak to third-party sites. Recommend: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2707: in test_qa13_referrer_policy_present
    assert rp, (
E   AssertionError: Missing Referrer-Policy header — full URL referrers may leak to third-party sites. Recommend: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
E   assert ''

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2707: in test_qa13_referrer_policy_present
    assert rp, (
E   AssertionError: Missing Referrer-Policy header — full URL referrers may leak to third-party sites. Recommend: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
E   assert ''
Browser: Chromium Viewport: 1280x720 Env: Staging Spec: View page
QA-13 -005 CRITICAL P0
Failed: Test qa13 content security policy present
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa13_content_security_policy_present 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 0.22s
📋 What this test was checking
A Content-Security-Policy header should be set (XSS mitigation) — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
A Content-Security-Policy header should be set (XSS mitigation).
✗ What actually happened
Failed: No Content-Security-Policy (nor CSP-Report-Only) header — XSS payloads have no defense-in-depth mitigation
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2723: in test_qa13_content_security_policy_present
    pytest.fail(
E   Failed: No Content-Security-Policy (nor CSP-Report-Only) header — XSS payloads have no defense-in-depth mitigation

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2723: in test_qa13_content_security_policy_present
    pytest.fail(
E   Failed: No Content-Security-Policy (nor CSP-Report-Only) header — XSS payloads have no defense-in-depth mitigation
Browser: Chromium Viewport: 1280x720 Env: Staging Spec: View page
QA-13 -006 CRITICAL P0
Failed: Test qa13 no server version disclosure
🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 0.22s
📋 What this test was checking
Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions (e.g. 'nginx/1.18.0', 'Express') — info-disclosure issue — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions
✗ What actually happened
Server version disclosed in response headers: ['Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)', 'X-Powered-By: Next.js'] — helps attackers fingerprint vulnerable versions. Recommend: server_tokens off; (nginx) or x-powered-by removal
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2756: in test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure
    assert not leaks, (
E   AssertionError: Server version disclosed in response headers: ['Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)', 'X-Powered-By: Next.js'] — helps attackers fingerprint vulnerable versions. Recommend: server_tokens off; (nginx) or x-powered-by removal
E   assert not ['Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)', 'X-Powered-By: Next.js']

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2756: in test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure
    assert not leaks, (
E   AssertionError: Server version disclosed in response headers: ['Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)', 'X-Powered-By: Next.js'] — helps attackers fingerprint vulnerable versions. Recommend: server_tokens off; (nginx) or x-powered-by removal
E   assert not ['Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)', 'X-Powered-By: Next.js']
Browser: Chromium Viewport: 1280x720 Env: Staging Spec: View page

🔗 https://dev.prowhats.com/en 🧪 test_qa19_autonomous_exploration 🕐 2026-05-19 16:16:15 ⏱ 81.14s
📋 What this test was checking
Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered. Hard-fails ONLY on confirmed bugs (JS errors, 5xx, broken navigation). Soft passes when nothing meaningful surfaces — verified against https://dev.prowhats.com/en. Test parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
params: [homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered.
✗ What actually happened
IndexError: list index out of range

❌ FAILED test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths params: [7, min, 7, digits] —
What this test checks:Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length.
Test data used:params: [7, min, 7, digits]
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths
Expected:Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
What happened:The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

What happened:English button missing aria-label='English'

❌ qa13_security_headers — 0 passed · 6 failed · 6 total ▶ Show tests
Click any test row below to expand and see what was verified, the test data used, and (for failures) what went wrong in plain English.
❌ FAILED test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present
Expected:HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
What happened:Missing Strict-Transport-Security header — HTTPS downgrade attacks possible. Recommend: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
Bug ticket:QA-13 -001 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_x_frame_options_or_csp_frame_ancestors BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Must protect against clickjacking via X-Frame-Options OR CSP frame-ancestors.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_x_frame_options_or_csp_frame_ancestors
Expected:Must protect against clickjacking via X-Frame-Options OR
What happened:Page is clickjacking-vulnerable — missing both X-Frame-Options and CSP frame-ancestors. xfo='', csp=''
Bug ticket:QA-13 -002 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_x_content_type_options_nosniff BASE_URL —
What this test checks:X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff prevents MIME-sniffing attacks.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_x_content_type_options_nosniff
Expected:X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff prevents MIME-sniffing attacks.
What happened:X-Content-Type-Options should be 'nosniff' to prevent MIME-sniffing attacks. Got: ''
Bug ticket:QA-13 -003 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_referrer_policy_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Referrer-Policy controls what referrer info is leaked to other sites.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_referrer_policy_present
Expected:Referrer-Policy controls what referrer info is leaked to other sites.
What happened:Missing Referrer-Policy header — full URL referrers may leak to third-party sites. Recommend: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Bug ticket:QA-13 -004 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_content_security_policy_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:A Content-Security-Policy header should be set (XSS mitigation).
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_content_security_policy_present
Expected:A Content-Security-Policy header should be set (XSS mitigation).
What happened:Failed: No Content-Security-Policy (nor CSP-Report-Only) header — XSS payloads have no defense-in-depth mitigation
Bug ticket:QA-13 -005 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions (e.g. 'nginx/1.18.0', 'Express') — info-disclosure issue.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure
Expected:Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions
What happened:Server version disclosed in response headers: ['Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)', 'X-Powered-By: Next.js'] — helps attackers fingerprint vulnerable versions. Recommend: server_tokens off; (nginx) or x-powered-by removal
Bug ticket:QA-13 -006 — see full details below

Test data used:[/.env, env file] · BASE_URL
Duration:0.19s
Test function:test_qa15_no_sensitive_endpoint_exposed
✅ PASSED test_qa15_404_does_not_leak_stacktrace BASE_URL 0.19s
What this test checks:A 404 page must not contain Python/Java/Node stacktraces or framework debug info.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:0.19s
Test function:test_qa15_404_does_not_leak_stacktrace
✅ PASSED test_qa15_sequential_id_probe_no_oracle [1] · BASE_URL 0.58s
What this test checks:Probing common /users/{id} or /api/users/{id} paths must NOT return a different response shape for valid vs invalid IDs (which would be a username-enumeration oracle).
Test data used:[1] · BASE_URL
Duration:0.58s
Test function:test_qa15_sequential_id_probe_no_oracle
✅ PASSED test_qa15_options_method_does_not_leak_methods BASE_URL 0.19s
What this test checks:An OPTIONS preflight must not return wildcard methods like TRACE, DELETE on the root that could enable cross-site tracing.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:0.19s
Test function:test_qa15_options_method_does_not_leak_methods

What this test checks:Going offline mid-session must not produce uncaught JS errors.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:4.00s

✅ PASSED test_qa18_blocked_api_shows_no_white_screen BASE_URL 4.17s
What this test checks:If the main API is unreachable, the page must still render SOMETHING (loader, error message, fallback content) — never a completely blank white page.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:4.17s
Test function:test_qa18_blocked_api_shows_no_white_screen
✅ PASSED test_qa18_slow_network_does_not_show_partial_data BASE_URL 4.54s

Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:4.54s
Test function:test_qa18_slow_network_does_not_show_partial_data
✅ PASSED test_qa18_5xx_response_shown_friendly BASE_URL 3.15s

❌ qa19_exploratory — 0 passed · 4 failed · 4 total ▶ Show tests

❌ FAILED test_qa19_autonomous_exploration params: [homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en] —
What this test checks:Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered. Hard-fails ONLY on confirmed bugs (JS errors, 5xx, broken navigation). Soft passes when nothing meaningful surfaces.
Test data used:params: [homepage_en, https://dev.prowhats.com/en]
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa19_autonomous_exploration
Expected:Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered.
What happened:IndexError: list index out of range
Bug ticket:QA-19 -001 — see full details below
